> # ⛔ NOT FILEABLE
> **This claim has a fatal defect and must NOT be served as-is.** Fix the following first:
>
> - **notice.correct_party** (`SOPO Cap.652 (service on the respondent)`): Claim served on 'Dragon Build Ltd', which does NOT match the respondent 'Dragon Build (Kowloon) Ltd'. Service on the wrong party renders the notice void.

# PAYMENT CLAIM
**Made under the Construction Industry Security of Payment Ordinance (Cap. 652)**

**Date of this claim:** 2026-03-02  
**Reference date:** 2026-02-28

## 1. Parties

| | Name | Role |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Claimant** | Acme Subcontracting Ltd | subcontractor |
| **Respondent** | Dragon Build (Kowloon) Ltd | main contractor |

## 2. The contract

- **Contract identification:** Subcontract between Acme Subcontracting Ltd and Dragon Build (Kowloon) Ltd
- **Contract type:** main_construction
- **Contract sum:** HKD 8,000,000.00
- **Work period covered by this claim:** 2026-02-01 to 2026-02-28

## 3. Amount claimed

> **Total claimed (this claim): HKD 1,250,000.00**

## 4. Particulars and basis of calculation

Sum of the itemised particulars below.

| # | Description | Qty | Unit | Rate | Amount (HKD) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Rebar fixing to grid C-F | — | — | — | 1,250,000.00 |

## 5. Supporting documents

  1. invoice_42.pdf
  2. site_diary_feb.pdf

## 6. Statutory statement

> This payment claim is made under the Construction Industry Security of Payment Ordinance (Cap. 652).

## 7. Service

- **Served on:** Dragon Build Ltd
- **Method of service:** personal_delivery
- **Date served:** 2026-03-02
